The '''Battle of Tammuz-an''' was a stand-alone conflict in the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Prelude==
Coveting the wealth of the planet [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]], the space pirate [[Gir Kybo Ren-Cha]] planned a full-scale invasion of the system in order to rob it of its many riches. [[File:The_Demolisher_Pirate_TIEs.jpg|thumb|left|150px|''[[Demolisher]]'' catches a [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]] [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]] fighter.]] Having already intercepted fuel shipments to the planet's [[Tammuz-an space navy|space navy]], Ren believed Tammuz-an ill-equipped to defend against his attack. The pirate's forces had captured a small [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Gladiator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] as it was sitting in a repair dock, and were intent on using it to subdue the lightly defended system. The ''[[Demolisher]]'' would emerge from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], unleash its complement of captured [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and bombard Tammuz-an from orbit. The plan would have worked, had it not been for the fact that the fuel shipments were decoys and sabotage would come to ruin the ''Demolisher'' internally.

==The battle==
[[File:Tammuz-an_navy1.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Tammuz-an's navy engages ''Demolisher''.]]

As ''Demolisher'' exited hyperspace, it engaged the battle-ready Tammuz-an fleet. Inside the ship, the droids [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] were being held captive and put to work. However, R2's quick thinking led him to sabotage the weapons system, by loading an inverted [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] into the launch bay. The resulting explosions crippled ''Demolisher'', and foiled Kybo's plans. He was soon captured by [[Mon Julpa]]'s forces, along with his crew, thus ending the battle.
